name: codegraph
desc: CodeGraph (MCP-native code knowledge graph). Delivered as an MCP server so its tools auto-inject. Set env CODEGRAPH to its entrypoint, e.g. CODEGRAPH='node /path/to/codegraph/dist/bin/codegraph.js'. NOTE: forfeits on Zig-heavy repos (V8 WASM-grammar OOM) — recorded as FORFEIT.
forfeit_grep: out of memory|Fatal process out of memory|FatalProcessOutOfMemory|unable to open database
